Headline: #39 Pershing Temporary Reroute at Indiana & 40th
ShortDescription: 39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near Indiana & 40th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
39 Pershing buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 39th, Prairie, 41st, State, Pershing, over regular route due to street blockage near Indiana & 40th. 

Southbound in reverse

Allow extra travel time.
